SEARCH
Package com.dua3.utility.awt

Class AwtStandardImage

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.awt.AwtStandardImage
All Implemented Interfaces:
AwtImage, Image, Storable, RenderedImage
public final class AwtStandardImage extends Object implements AwtImage
A class that represents an image using the Swing BufferedImage API. It implements the Image interface.

      public int width()
      Description copied from interface: Image
      Get image width.

      Returns:
      the image width in pixels

      public int height()

      Returns:
      the image height in pixels

    • getArgb

      public int[] getArgb()
      Description copied from interface: Image
      Get image data. The returned array consists of width*height integers each storing a single pixels color encoded in ARGB byte order using premultiplied alpha.
      Specified by:
      getArgb in interface Image
      Returns:
      the image width in pixels
